verses.text: That we are to be urgent in prayers.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Epistle of Paul to the Colossians: “Be instant in prayer, and watch therein.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the first Psalm: “But in the law of the Lord is his will, and in His law will he meditate day and night.”
